title: Skizzleman Zombies
description:
Skizzleman-ificates your zombies. 
What's up, homeh buddeh?
body:
This resource pack turns regular zombies into Skizzleman, with custom Skizz voicelines and all! 

**IMPORTANT:**

As this resource pack uses custom textures, it requires **[Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)** and **[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)** or OptiFine to enable the skin variants; otherwise, you'll end up with just the regular Skizz. As of version 1.2.0, **[Entity Sound Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/esf)** is also required to enable some extra "eugh" ambient sounds.

**Now with more "eugh"-mph!**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FHaryqbjF5o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The following skin variants are included:
- Default Skizz
- Poe Poe Skizz
- Dark Skizz
- Attorney Skizz
- Permit Reaper Skizz
- OlympZITS Skizz
- Revenant Skizz
- Christmas Skizz
- MCC Blank Canvas Skizz
- Hunter Skizz
- Rejects (Past Life) Skizz

Drowned, husks, and zombie villagers are not affected. N&S Skizz is not included for decency reasons.
